# terrible_wti_remote_cpm_web_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cpm_password` (String) This is the Password of the WTI device to send the module. If the cpm_username is blank, this parameter is presumed to be a User Token.
- `cpm_url` (String) This is the URL of the WTI device to send the module.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `interface` (String) The ethernet port for the SNMP we are defining.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `cpm_username` (String) This is the Username of the WTI device to send the module. If this value is blank, then the cpm_password is presumed to be a User Token.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `harden` (Number) Security level for the WEB the device will respond to 0 = Off, 1 = Medium, 2 = High.
- `hsts` (Number) If HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) is enabled/disabled for the WEB.
- `httpenable` (Number) Activates unsecure WEB for the specified interface.
- `httpport` (Number) Port used by the insecure WEB.
- `httpsenable` (Number) Activates secure WEB for the specified interface.
- `httpsport` (Number) Port used by the secure WEB.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `inter_filename` (String) Intermediate Certificate to be assigned to the Device.
- `ocsp` (Number) Current state of the Online Certificate Status Protocol (OCSP) for the Web Server.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `private_filename` (String) Private Certificate to be assigned to the Device.
- `signed_filename` (String) Signed Certificate to be assigned to the Device.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `tlsmode` (Number) Which TLS the WEB will use 0 = TLSv1.1, 1 = TLSv1.1/TLSv1.2, 2 = TLSv1.2/TLSv1.3, 3 = TLSv1.3
- `trace` (Number) Current state of TRACE requests for thw Web Server.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `use_https` (Boolean) Designates to use an https connection or http connection.
- `use_proxy` (Boolean) Flag to control if the lookup will observe HTTP proxy environment variables when present.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) If false, SSL certificates will not be validated. This should only be used on personally controlled sites using self-signed certificates.
- `webterm` (Number) Current state of the CLI over Web for the Web Server.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `data` (String) The output JSON returned from the commands sent
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
